block_00: May this spirit of freedom lead us all to success and glory in life. Happy Independence Day! Svatantrata divas mubarak!
block_03: Let’s join Vande Mataram Tournament 2021 of Pride and Valour!
block_05: Happy India Independence Day to everyone with all faith in the words, freedom in the mind and pride in your souls.
block_06: It is a great time for you to celebrate the joy of freedom by participating in Vande Mataram Tournament 2021, that will be taking place on 15 Aug 2021, with 15 traders to win and share a prize pool of $2,000!
